hotel_name: COCO HOUSE Đà Lạt (COCO HOUSE Đa Lat)

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Once and never again. I booked a suite room but there wasn't even a towel, the soundproofing was poor, the shelves were dusty, and the hot water didn't work. The hotel is located in an alley at the end of the street. With a price of 600k per night, you can find a better hotel than this.

reviews.title: Da Lat magnifique mais avec un autre hôtel la prochaine fois.
reviews.positives: L'emplacement est situé près du lac cependant il y a de gros travaux juste à côté et deux routes vraiment passante.
reviews.negatives: Ma chambre était situé au 4eme étage, sans vue. Je suis arrivé l'odeur de la chambre était vraiment désagréable, il y avait des poils sur le lit et un torchon avec de la moisissure. L'impression que le ménage avait simplement était bâclé. De plus la réception était la majeur partie du temps vide et ils sont difficilement joignables. En prime j'avais le chauffe-eau au dessus de ma chambre qui faisait du bruit jour et nuit. J'ai donc dès le premier jour acheté une bougie et des boulequies pour rendre ce séjour le plus agréable possible. Je ne recommande pas cet hôtel.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: The soundproofing is poor, it's a bit small, the water pressure is strong, and the disposable items are acceptable. The bed and mattress are average, making my back hurt a bit. The room is heavily decorated, so it can collect dust easily if not cleaned properly.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Homestay ở vị trí dễ tìm, đi bộ tới chợ Đà Lạt khá gần
reviews.negatives: Nên gắn móc treo đồ trong nhà tắm

reviews.title: Need to consider when booking a room.
reviews.text:
The location is very convenient for moving around, you don't have to pull your suitcase up a slope, the night market, Hoa Binh area, Xuan Huong lake, and the square are all close by. The owner is super friendly and helps with early check-in for guests. 
Cons: the price is high compared to other places, higher than the average, the pictures have been edited so they appear brighter than in reality, the decor items in the room are old. I experienced two types of rooms: standard and premium; the standard room is not soundproof, the VIP room has a bathtub but is not cleaned well, the bathtub drain button is broken, and the bouquet or candles for decor are moldy and unusable, making it impossible to soak in the tub, the bed in the VIP room is a spring mattress and causes back pain. The bathroom has a smell, there are few power outlets in the room, and there's no table for items despite the room being as large as 35m2.

reviews.title: Kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời, chỗ ở hài lòng, sẽ ủng hộ trong lần nghỉ tiếp theo
reviews.positives: Hỗ trợ khách tốt, chủ homestay nhiệt tình, thân thiện

reviews.title: good place to stay for a trip
reviews.text: I recommend this because this hotel is very comfortable to stay in while traveling. But, if you have walking difficulties this is not suitable because the Grab/Taxi pick up point is on a main road which means you have to go out of a small and steep alley.  The price is also not according to Agoda, a few days before the trip the owner will contact to inform if there are additional costs, so if Agoda gives a discount, sometimes it does not match reality because we still have to pay the original price, the rest is asked to be given at the counter.

reviews.title: Rất ok
reviews.positives: Phòng siêu dễ thương, sạch sẽ, chị chủ xinh đẹp

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
Good-priced hotel, central location.  
Friendly hotel owner, nice to guests.

reviews.title: Ok
reviews.positives: Sạch sẽ, tiện nghi, thoải mái, cảm thấy ok nhất là khi nào cũng có nước nóng để sử dụng

reviews.title: So prettyyy
reviews.text:
Phòng quá là xinh, lại còn rất gần chợ đêm đi bộ được luôn, bạn lễ tân cũng nhiệt tình nữa.
Chắc chắn mình sẽ quay lại đây mỗi khi đi Đà Lạt! 🪴🌸🌧️

reviews.title: tuyệt vời
reviews.positives: lần đầu tiên đi Đà lạt mà book ngay phòng đẹp, dịch vụ tốt , ngay chợ đêm , đi bộ ra HXH tiện . Nói chung là thoải mái , chắc chắn sẽ ghé lại . cám ơn các bạn nv luôn dễ thương .

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: friendly owner, located right in the center for easy transportation

reviews.title: Experience at CoCo House.
reviews.text: The place is very clean and tidy. The staff is enthusiastic and easy-going. The central location makes it very convenient to get around. I will definitely come back here.

reviews.title: Perfect for couples
reviews.text: One of the cheapest but beautiful hotel. Prefect for couples and family. Beautiful ambient.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The home is clean, well-equipped, and the owner is very charming. It's close to the center, making it very convenient for getting around. They also offer motorbike rental services. I recommend everyone to book here.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The homestay owner is very friendly and enthusiastic, the room rates are reasonable and the rooms are clean. I will come back many times when I go to Da Lat.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Home is close to the center, the room is small and pretty, and it smells nice. Next time, I will still choose CoCo again.

reviews.title: Good Hine Stay
reviews.text: Good for Service and have a rant motor bike at the homestay.when i back da lat i will choose this home stay agian

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Phòng ốc sạch sẽ, nhân viên rất nhiệt tình hỗ trợ.
